metadata.title: WAV Vietnam | Premium Sound Studio - Recording, Production & Mix Master
metadata.description: Professional recording studio in Vietnam. Expert mix & master services with analog gear. Trusted by 150+ indie artists. Book your session today.

hero.heading: Authentic Sound
hero.description: Where raw ideas are refined into sonic masterpieces using cutting-edge analog high-end equipment.

philosophy.label: The Soul
philosophy.quote: We don't just record machines, we capture the authenticity in every note.
philosophy.description: Every song is a story. At WAV Vietnam, we ensure your story is told through the most honest and emotional sound possible.

recording.title: Acoustic Recording
recording.description: International standard acoustic processing, delivering absolute clarity and authenticity for vocals.

production.title: Music Production
production.description: Professional arrangement and composition, creating a distinct sonic identity for artists.

mixing.title: Pro Mix & Master
mixing.description: Analog gear processing for signature warmth and depth in every track.

contactFab.title: Reach the studio fast
contactFab.description: Pick the channel that suits you best and we will get back to you quickly.

studio.label: Vibe & Comfort
studio.heading: Comfort for Creativity.
studio.description: We believe the best inspiration comes from comfort. At WAV Vietnam, you not only work in a professional environment but are also supported by a dedicated team with deep experience and expertise. This helps create a space where artists can fully immerse themselves in music without being interrupted by technical concerns or environmental distractions.

gear.label: The Armory
gear.heading: Technical Weaponry.
gear.description: We use legendary equipment sought after worldwide to ensure every recording meets commercial quality standards.

members.name: SniT
members.bio: 8+ years of experience, the driving force behind WAV Vietnam's Mix & Master quality.

members.name: Thúy Quỳnh
members.bio: 8+ years of experience specializing in vocal production and recording.

members.name: Đạt Nguyễn
members.bio: 8+ years of experience in songwriting and vocal coaching.

plans.title: Arrangement & Music Production
plans.subtitle: For new songs or cover projects
features: Arrangement tailored to the artist's vocal range
Delivery of the completed instrumental production
Final production revisions based on feedback

plans.title: Full Song Production
plans.subtitle: End-to-end production from idea to completion
features: Includes all services from the Starter and Popular packages
Artwork design support for single/album releases
Distribution support across digital music platforms

plans.title: Recording, Editing & Mix & Master
plans.subtitle: Professional full recording completion solution
features: In-studio recording session with engineer assistance
Final version revisions based on feedback

newsletter.label: Join The Community
newsletter.heading: Get Free Music Production Guide.
newsletter.description: Subscribe to get tips on home recording, vocal stem prep, and latest music trends from WAV Vietnam experts.

questions.question: What should I prepare before recording?
questions.answer: You should memorize the lyrics, prepare beats (high-quality WAV file), and send a demo to the engineer beforehand. Good sleep and proper hydration also help your voice reach peak performance.

questions.question: How long does Mix & Master take?
questions.answer: Typically, the mix & master process takes 3-5 business days depending on the song's complexity. We always prioritize product quality above all else.

questions.question: Can you do online mixing services?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer professional online mixing services nationwide and internationally. Simply send your stems through our cloud system and we'll deliver the final master within 48 hours.

questions.question: What formats do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all standard audio formats including WAV, MP3, FLAC, and more. We recommend WAV for best quality. Contact us for specific requirements.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.address: District 1, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
